dimensions.name: has_premium
dimensions.description: Filter on this to determine if row represents a premium. Filter should evaluate to 'has_premium = 1' if a premium and not if not a premium

semantic_models.name: fire_claim
semantic_models.description: A semantic model for fire insurance claims data.

measures.name: premium
measures.description: The total premium amount for the policy.

semantic_models.name: location_address
semantic_models.description: This table contains address information, including historical data for addresses that can change over time.

semantic_models.name: organization
semantic_models.description: A table containing information about various organizations, including identifiers and industry classifications.

semantic_models.name: occurrence_events
semantic_models.description: Details of various occurrences including dates, times, and locations.

semantic_models.name: policy_amount
semantic_models.description: A model representing the amounts associated with insurance policies, including details of the policy coverage and the insured object.

measures.name: total_policy_amount
measures.description: The total amount associated with the policy.

semantic_models.name: claim_policy_bridge
semantic_models.description: Bridge table linking claims to policies for analysis

measures.name: claims_by_policy
measures.description: Count of claims associated with policies

measures.name: days_to_settle
measures.description: Average days from claim open to close

semantic_models.name: insurable_object
semantic_models.description: This table contains information about insurable objects, including their type and geographic location.

entities.name: party_identifier
entities.description: Use this in coordination with filter on party_role_code to refer to agent_id or policyholder_id or policy holder in general

dimensions.name: party_identifier_dim
dimensions.description: Use this in coordination with filter on party_role_code to refer to agent_id or policyholder_id or policy holder in general

dimensions.name: party_role_code
dimensions.description: Must filter using this dimension if referring to agents or policyholders. If party_role_code = 'PH' then Party_Identifier refers to policy_holder_id, if party_role_code = 'AG' then Party_Identifier refers to agent_id. Should be used in coordination with party_identifier

semantic_models.name: policy_coverage_detail
semantic_models.description: This semantic model represents the coverage details of policies including their effective dates, descriptions, and identifiers.

semantic_models.name: party
semantic_models.description: A table containing party information, including names, active dates, and types.

semantic_models.name: policy_premium_detail
semantic_models.description: Policy premium detail at policy_amount grain for policy size calculations

measures.name: total_premium_amount
measures.description: Sum of premium amounts (aggregated by semantic layer)

measures.name: policy_count
measures.description: Distinct count of policies (aggregated by semantic layer)

semantic_models.name: policy_holder_policy
semantic_models.description: Relationship between policy holders and their policies

measures.name: policies_per_holder
measures.description: Number of distinct policies per policy holder

semantic_models.name: geographic_location
semantic_models.description: This semantic model represents various geographic locations along with their identifiers and types.

metrics.name: total_policy_amount
metrics.description: The total amount associated with the policy.
metrics.label: total_policy_amount

metrics.name: total_premium
metrics.description: Total premium amount across all policies
metrics.label: Total Premium

metrics.name: average_policy_size
metrics.description: Average policy size calculated as total premium divided by number of distinct policies
metrics.label: Average Policy Size
